mapper.select: SELECT id, question_id, seq, choice_text, image_url, is_correct FROM question_choice WHERE question_id = #{questionId} ORDER BY seq
SELECT id FROM question_choice WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND is_correct = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM question_choice WHERE question_id = #{questionId} AND is_correct = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO question_choice (question_id, seq, choice_text, image_url, is_correct) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{seq}, #{choiceText}, #{imageUrl}, #{isCorrect})
